title: Amtech - Ball Pein Hammer, Hardened and Polished Head, Traditional Wooden Handle, Lightweight for Precision Metalwork and Jewellery (4oz / 115g)
features: ENGINEERS HAMMER DESIGN: Balanced head shape for workshop use, shaping and controlled striking on metalwork.
BALL PEIN PROFILE: Supports peining, riveting and forming tasks where accuracy is important.
FOR METALWORKING & DIY: Ideal for garages, workshops and general maintenance tasks.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Built for regular use across DIY and trade environments.
SECURE HANDLING: Designed for confident grip and improved control during use.
description: Product Description Versatility ✓ Ideal for shaping, striking, punching, and riveting unhardened metals ✓ Lightweight 4oz (115g) head for delicate, controlled work ✓ Perfect for metal fabrication and DIY repairs ✓ Easy to manoeuvre for detailed, intricate tasks Comfort ✓ Smooth wooden handle for a natural, comfortable grip ✓ Balanced weight for stable, accurate swings ✓ Reduces hand fatigue during extended use ✓ Designed for steady, controlled performance Durability ✓ Hardened & tempered polished steel head ✓ Strong wooden handle built for everyday use ✓ Reliable performance for repeated metalworking tasks ✓ Long-lasting tool for DIY and trade applications Convenience ✓ Compact and lightweight for easy handling ✓ Fits neatly into any toolbox ✓ Quick to grab for precise metal shaping ✓ Simple to maintain by wiping clean after use
